prayer.title: 🕊️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who guides the steps of man — direct my path today.
prayer.psalm: Psalm 20:4: "May He give you the desire of your heart and make all your plans succeed."
prayer.proverb: Proverbs 11:1: "Dishonest scales are an abomination to the Lord, but accurate weights are His delight."
prayer.intention: Help me lead with integrity. Let my yes be yes and my no be no.
prayer.closing: The Lord goes before you today. He will be with you; He will never leave you nor forsake you. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.

weather.title: 🌧️ Weather — Temecula
weather.detail: 100% chance of rain today. South winds 10-20 mph, gusts to 35 mph. Tonight: showers and possible thunderstorms, low 43°F. Tuesday: more showers likely. Wednesday clears partially. Weekend looks sunny with highs near 64-70°F.
weather.advisory: Washington's Birthday storm — heavy rain all day. Keep an umbrella handy.

calendar.title: 📅 Calendar
calendar.today: Presidents' Day (Washington's Birthday) — Federal holiday. Markets closed.
calendar.week: Calendar sync unavailable this morning. Check Google Calendar for this week's events.

email.title: 📧 Email
email.summary: Email sync unavailable this morning. Check inboxes manually.

mre.title: 📊 MRE Trading
mre.regime_detail: SPY sideways (3 days), QQQ sideways (10 days). Momentum weakening. Both below EMA-20 and EMA-50 but above EMA-200.
mre.thesis: Fear at 36, sideways regime. No BUY signals today — MRE waiting for deeper fear (<15). Rotation into commodities, energy, and international continues. Tech and financials weakening. Markets closed today (Presidents' Day).

family.title: 💛 Family Focus
family.potency_action: Give her space if she needs it, then come back with a genuine apology
recommendations: PRIORITY: Focus on repair. Acknowledge recent conflicts without defending.
Increase acts of service dramatically this week.
Create space for her to express frustrations without fixing.
family.reminder: Jones turns 3 on Feb 22 — 6 days away! 🎂

stories.headline: Israel economy rebounds — 3.1% growth in 2025
stories.detail: Official data shows Israel GDP grew 3.1% in 2025, rebounding from 1% in 2024 despite ongoing Gaza operations. Resilient economy.

stories.headline: Israel cabinet tightens West Bank control
stories.detail: Security cabinet approved measures to increase Israeli sovereignty over West Bank, ease settler land purchases. Palestinians call it 'de facto annexation.'

stories.headline: IRGC starts naval drills in Strait of Hormuz
stories.detail: Iran's Revolutionary Guard conducting naval exercises ahead of second round of US-Iran talks. Pressure tactic.

stories.headline: Netanyahu: Trump determined to exhaust deal options with Iran before force
stories.detail: At Conference of Presidents, Netanyahu says Trump learned lessons from June 2025 war, believes Iran won't miss deal opportunity.

stories.headline: Israeli elections heating up
stories.detail: 2026 legislative election taking shape — Eisenkot potentially joining Yesh Atid or Bennett's party. Political realignment underway.

stories.headline: Anthropic raises $30B at $380B valuation
stories.detail: Second-largest venture funding deal of all time. Claude maker continues massive fundraising as AI competition intensifies.

stories.headline: Coinbase launches 'Agentic Wallets'
stories.detail: AI agents can now autonomously spend, earn, and trade with programmable guardrails. Financial autonomy for AI agents is here.

stories.headline: Humans& raises $480M seed round
stories.detail: Largest seed in history. AI lab focused on human-centered AI and relationships. Market for mega-rounds continues.

stories.headline: Gemini Deep Think for scientific research
stories.detail: Google's Gemini Deep Think solving professional research problems across math, physics, and CS. Reasoning models maturing.

stories.headline: AI industry shifts to monetization
stories.detail: OpenAI adds ads to ChatGPT. Industry moving from model releases to sustainable business models. Enterprise integration accelerating.
